metadata.title: Sneaking Through Hookah for a Clean 2v1 Win in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a sneaky Hookah push where timing and quick aim secure a 2v1 win. How do you handle close-range duels on Bind? Share your clutch moves below!

Got a clutch like this? Drop your best plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
